movie.actors: Uma Thurman, Lucy Liu, Vivica A. Fox, Daryl Hannah
movie.awards: Nominated for 1 Golden Globe. Another 27 wins & 99 nominations.
movie.plot: After awakening from a four-year coma, a former assassin wreaks vengeance on the team of assassins who betrayed her.
movie.title: Kill Bill: Vol. 1
movie.writer: Quentin Tarantino, Quentin Tarantino (character The Bride), Uma Thurman (character The Bride)
